name: From Atomic Actions to Standard Operating Procedures: Iterative Tool Optimization for Self-Evolving LLM Agents (2607.07321)

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: Tool utilization enables LLM agents to interact with the real world, but existing frameworks rely on static toolsets of granular atomic actions, forcing agents to reinvent low-level logic for every recurring workflow. We propose EvoSOP, a framework empowering agents to extract SOPs from execution trajectories and iteratively optimize the toolset through construction, merging, evaluation, and pruning lifecycle.
